summary: Backend testing for Manufacturing Requests feature - All 14 tests passed. Verified: 1) POST /api/manufacturing-requests creates new request from manufacturing to warehouse with proper data enrichment, 2) GET /api/manufacturing-requests returns all requests with optional status filter, 3) POST /api/manufacturing-requests/{id}/fulfill executes request and transfers materials from warehouse to manufacturing inventory, 4) PATCH /api/manufacturing-requests/{id}/status?status=rejected allows rejecting requests
critical_code_review_comments: Code review passed: POST /api/manufacturing-requests correctly creates request with enriched item details (material_name, unit, cost_per_unit, available_quantity) - lines 1156-1215
Code review passed: GET /api/manufacturing-requests supports optional status filter parameter - lines 1217-1227
Code review passed: POST /api/manufacturing-requests/{id}/fulfill validates pending status, checks material availability, deducts from warehouse, adds to manufacturing inventory - lines 1229-1319
Code review passed: PATCH /api/manufacturing-requests/{id}/status validates status against allowed values (pending, fulfilled, rejected, cancelled) - lines 1321-1343
Code review passed: Fulfill endpoint creates inventory_movements record for audit trail - lines 1308-1317
Code review passed: Insufficient materials returns 400 with detailed insufficient_materials list - lines 1253-1260
seed_data_creation: Created test raw materials with prefix TEST_ for testing manufacturing requests feature
context_for_next_testing_agent: Manufacturing requests feature verified. Key endpoints: POST /api/manufacturing-requests (create request from manufacturing to warehouse), GET /api/manufacturing-requests (list all requests, optional status filter), POST /api/manufacturing-requests/{id}/fulfill (execute request, transfer materials), PATCH /api/manufacturing-requests/{id}/status?status=rejected (reject request). All features working correctly. Existing request e48a0afb-e774-435a-8a04-efe02167670d was found in the system.

tests_performed.details: Successfully created test raw material for subsequent tests
Request created with enriched item details (material_name, unit, cost_per_unit, available_quantity)
Returns list of all manufacturing requests
Fulfills request, deducts from warehouse, adds to manufacturing inventory, updates status to fulfilled
Successfully rejects request and updates status
Returns 400 with insufficient_materials details when warehouse has insufficient stock
Existing request e48a0afb-e774-435a-8a04-efe02167670d found in system
